questions.template: A projectile is launched from ground level at {v} m/s at {theta} degrees. What is its time of flight? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
A projectile is launched from ground level at {v} m/s at {theta} degrees. What is its maximum height? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
A projectile is fired from ground level at {v} m/s at {theta} degrees. What is its horizontal range? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
A ball is thrown horizontally at {v} m/s from a height of {h} m. How far from the base does it land? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
